---
title: "About"
---

This website is dedicated to my academic writing and research on empirical evidence in public law. I am interested in how different branches of government use empirical evidence and data in the creation of law and legal rules. My scholarship has also used empirical methods to study particular claims and assumptions in constitutional law, especially those dealing with law and religion. Thanks for visiting and please connect!


## Research Interests

- Constitutional Law
- Empirical Methods
